message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="QA review for T6 State Machine">
You are QA reviewer for task T6: M3 — Task State Machine.

INPUT (Read these files):
- Task description: Build TaskStateMachineService, TaskStatusController, StatusUpdateRequest, TransitionResponse. AC: PATCH status transitions (4 legal, all others illegal), GET available transitions, CLOSED is terminal, updatedAt on success, 401/404 handling.
- Test files: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskStatusControllerTest.java
- Implementation files: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskStateMachineService.java, C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskStatusController.java, C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/StatusUpdateRequest.java, C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TransitionResponse.java
- CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/2026-03-09-CONTRACT.md
- Standards: none
- ALLOWED files: service/TaskStateMachineService.java, controller/TaskStatusController.java, dto/StatusUpdateRequest.java, dto/TransitionResponse.java
- Log output: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/logs/qa-task-6.log.md

THREE-WAY VERIFICATION (AC1-AC16):
STEP 1: Requirements ↔ Tests — all 16 ACs covered?
STEP 2: Tests ↔ Code
STEP 3: Requirements ↔ Code — check: exact legal transitions, CLOSED terminal, updatedAt update
STEP 4: Standards — SKIPPED
STEP 5: Code Quality — state transition logic clean?
STEP 6: File Scope

WRITE LOG then RETURN: QA-PASS or QA-FAIL.
</teammate-message>

[SECTION] API Contract

[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res={token:string,expiresIn:number(86400)} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none(Authorization:Bearer) | res={id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,optional,default:MEDIUM)} | res=TaskResponse(201) | errors=400,401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=TaskResponse | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,optional)} | res=TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=204-no-content | errors=401,404

[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)} | res=TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none | res={currentStatus:enum,availableTransitions:enum[]} | errors=401,404

[SECTION] Shared Types
[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW),status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED),createdBy:long,createdAt:ISO8601,updatedAt:ISO8601-or-null

content.text: Now I have all the information needed. Let me also check the TaskStatus enum to confirm the valid states.

I have all the information needed. Now let me perform the three-way verification and write the QA log.

**Analysis Summary:**

**STEP 1: Requirements <-> Tests (AC1-AC16)**

| AC | Requirement | Test Coverage |
|----|-------------|--------------|
| AC1 | Initial status = TODO | `newTask_hasTodoStatus` - PASS |
| AC2 | TODO -> IN_PROGRESS | `todoToInProgress_returns200` - PASS |
| AC3 | IN_PROGRESS -> TODO | `inProgressToTodo_returns200` - PASS |
| AC4 | IN_PROGRESS -> DONE | `inProgressToDone_returns200` - PASS |
| AC5 | DONE -> CLOSED | `doneToClosed_returns200` - PASS |
| AC6 | TODO -> DONE illegal | `todoToDone_returns400` - PASS |
| AC7 | CLOSED terminal | `closedToAny_returns400` (tests 3 sub-transitions) - PASS |
| AC8 | TODO -> CLOSED illegal | `todoToClosed_returns400` - PASS |
| AC9 | DONE -> TODO illegal | `doneToTodo_returns400` + `doneToInProgress_returns400` + `inProgressToClosed_returns400` - PASS |
| AC10 | updatedAt on success | `successfulTransition_updatesTimestamp` + `failedTransition_doesNotUpdateTimestamp` - PASS |
| AC11 | GET transitions TODO | `todoTransitions` verifies [IN_PROGRESS] - PASS |
| AC12 | GET transitions IN_PROGRESS | `inProgressTransitions` verifies [TODO, DONE] - PASS |
| AC13 | GET transitions DONE | `doneTransitions` verifies [CLOSED] - PASS |
| AC14 | GET transitions CLOSED | `closedTransitions` verifies [] - PASS |
| AC15 | 401 handling | `patchStatus_noToken_returns401`, `getTransitions_noToken_returns401`, `patchStatus_invalidToken_returns401` - PASS |
| AC16 | 404 handling | `patchStatus_nonExistentTask_returns404`, `getTransitions_nonExistentTask_returns404` - PASS |

**STEP 2: Tests <-> Code**

- Transition map in `TaskStateMachineService` lines 20-25: TODO->[IN_PROGRESS], IN_PROGRESS->[TODO,DONE], DONE->[CLOSED], CLOSED->[] -- matches all test expectations exactly.
- `updateStatus()` throws `IllegalStateException` on illegal transition -- caught by controller's `@ExceptionHandler` returning 400.
- `getAvailableTransitions()` returns `TransitionResponse` with correct shape.
- `ResourceNotFoundException` thrown when task not found -- caught by `GlobalExceptionHandler` returning 404.
- `@PreUpdate` on Task entity ensures `updatedAt` is set on save -- matches AC10 tests.
- Invalid enum string in status would throw `IllegalArgumentException` -- caught by controller handler.

**STEP 3: Requirements <-> Code**

- CONTRACT line 12: `PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status` with `{status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)}` returning `TaskResponse` with errors 400,401,404. Code matches exactly.
- CONTRACT line 13: `GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions` returning `{currentStatus:enum,availableTransitions:enum[]}` with errors 401,404. Code matches exactly.
- Legal transitions: 4 defined (TODO->IN_PROGRESS, IN_PROGRESS->TODO, IN_PROGRESS->DONE, DONE->CLOSED). CLOSED is terminal (empty list). All correct.
- `updatedAt` updated via JPA `@PreUpdate` lifecycle callback on `task.save()`. Only called on legal transitions. Correct.

**STEP 5: Code Quality**

- State machine uses `EnumMap` with `static` initialization block -- clean, performant, and immutable patterns (`List.of()`).
- Controller is thin, delegates to service properly.
- Exception handlers are well-placed: `IllegalStateException` + `IllegalArgumentException` at controller level, `ResourceNotFoundException` at global level.
- `toResponse()` method duplicates logic that likely exists in `TaskService`. Minor duplication but acceptable for decoupling.
- `findTask()` filters out soft-deleted tasks. Correct.

**STEP 6: File Scope**

- Files modified: `TaskStateMachineService.java`, `TaskStatusController.java`, `StatusUpdateRequest.java`, `TransitionResponse.java` -- all within ALLOWED list. PASS.

No issues found. Now let me write the log and return the result.

input.content:
# QA Log — T6: M3 — Task State Machine

## Result: QA-PASS

## Files Reviewed
- `service/TaskStateMachineService.java` (76 lines)
- `controller/TaskStatusController.java` (45 lines)
- `dto/StatusUpdateRequest.java` (12 lines)
- `dto/TransitionResponse.java` (20 lines)
- `controller/TaskStatusControllerTest.java` (594 lines, 20 test methods)

## STEP 1: Requirements <-> Tests

| AC | Description | Test(s) | Verdict |
|----|-------------|---------|---------|
| AC1 | Initial status = TODO | `newTask_hasTodoStatus` | PASS |
| AC2 | TODO -> IN_PROGRESS (200) | `todoToInProgress_returns200` | PASS |
| AC3 | IN_PROGRESS -> TODO (200) | `inProgressToTodo_returns200` | PASS |
| AC4 | IN_PROGRESS -> DONE (200) | `inProgressToDone_returns200` | PASS |
| AC5 | DONE -> CLOSED (200) | `doneToClosed_returns200` | PASS |
| AC6 | TODO -> DONE illegal (400) | `todoToDone_returns400` | PASS |
| AC7 | CLOSED terminal (400) | `closedToAny_returns400` (3 sub-cases) | PASS |
| AC8 | TODO -> CLOSED illegal (400) | `todoToClosed_returns400` | PASS |
| AC9 | DONE -> TODO illegal (400) | `doneToTodo_returns400`, `doneToInProgress_returns400`, `inProgressToClosed_returns400` | PASS |
| AC10 | updatedAt on success | `successfulTransition_updatesTimestamp`, `failedTransition_doesNotUpdateTimestamp` | PASS |
| AC11 | GET transitions TODO -> [IN_PROGRESS] | `todoTransitions` | PASS |
| AC12 | GET transitions IN_PROGRESS -> [TODO, DONE] | `inProgressTransitions` | PASS |
| AC13 | GET transitions DONE -> [CLOSED] | `doneTransitions` | PASS |
| AC14 | GET transitions CLOSED -> [] | `closedTransitions` | PASS |
| AC15 | 401 no/invalid token | `patchStatus_noToken_returns401`, `getTransitions_noToken_returns401`, `patchStatus_invalidToken_returns401` | PASS |
| AC16 | 404 non-existent task | `patchStatus_nonExistentTask_returns404`, `getTransitions_nonExistentTask_returns404` | PASS |

All 16 ACs covered by tests. Tests also include bonus coverage: full lifecycle, bounce lifecycle, response format validation, same-status transition.

## STEP 2: Tests <-> Code

- Transition map (`EnumMap<TaskStatus, List<TaskStatus>>`) defines exactly 4 legal transitions matching AC2-AC5.
- `updateStatus()` throws `IllegalStateException` on illegal transition -> controller `@ExceptionHandler` returns 400.
- `getAvailableTransitions()` returns `TransitionResponse(currentStatus, availableTransitions)` -> matches test assertions.
- `ResourceNotFoundException` from `findTask()` -> `GlobalExceptionHandler` returns 404 with `{message, timestamp}`.
- `IllegalArgumentException` (invalid enum value) -> controller handler returns 400.
- `@PreUpdate` on Task entity sets `updatedAt` automatically on `taskRepository.save()`.

All test expectations match implementation behavior.

## STEP 3: Requirements <-> Code

- CONTRACT line 12: `PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status` req=`{status:enum}` res=`TaskResponse` errors=400,401,404 -- MATCH.
- CONTRACT line 13: `GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions` res=`{currentStatus,availableTransitions}` errors=401,404 -- MATCH.
- Legal transitions: TODO->IN_PROGRESS, IN_PROGRESS->TODO, IN_PROGRESS->DONE, DONE->CLOSED -- all 4 correct.
- CLOSED is terminal (empty transition list) -- correct.
- `updatedAt` updated via JPA `@PreUpdate` on successful save; not updated on failed transition (exception thrown before save) -- correct.
- Soft-deleted tasks filtered in `findTask()` -- correct.

## STEP 4: Standards — SKIPPED (none provided)

## STEP 5: Code Quality

- State machine uses `EnumMap` with immutable `List.of()` -- clean and performant.
- Controller is thin, properly delegates to service.
- Exception handling well-structured: controller-level for domain errors, global for infrastructure.
- `toResponse()` in service duplicates mapping logic from `TaskService` -- minor duplication, acceptable for service decoupling.
- `StatusUpdateRequest` uses `@NotNull` validation on status field -- correct.

## STEP 6: File Scope

Files created/modified: `TaskStateMachineService.java`, `TaskStatusController.java`, `StatusUpdateRequest.java`, `TransitionResponse.java` -- all within ALLOWED list. PASS.

## Issues Found

None.

input.content:
**QA-PASS** for T6: M3 — Task State Machine.

All 16 ACs verified across three-way check (Requirements <-> Tests <-> Code):

- **AC1**: Initial status TODO -- correct
- **AC2-AC5**: 4 legal transitions (TODO->IN_PROGRESS, IN_PROGRESS->TODO, IN_PROGRESS->DONE, DONE->CLOSED) -- all correct
- **AC6-AC9**: Illegal transitions return 400 -- all correct (tests cover TODO->DONE, CLOSED->any, TODO->CLOSED, DONE->TODO, DONE->IN_PROGRESS, IN_PROGRESS->CLOSED)
- **AC10**: updatedAt set on success via JPA @PreUpdate, unchanged on failure -- correct
- **AC11-AC14**: GET transitions returns correct available transitions for each state -- correct
- **AC15**: 401 for no/invalid token -- correct
- **AC16**: 404 for non-existent task -- correct

Code quality is clean: EnumMap with immutable List.of(), thin controller, proper exception handling chain. File scope within ALLOWED list.

Log written to: `docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/logs/qa-task-6.log.md`
input.summary: T6 State Machine QA-PASS, all 16 ACs verified
